verses.text: Israel mite aw, note' langkhata Topa' thugen, hih thu limtakin ngai un: Egypt gam panin na minam bupun note kong paikhatpih hi
Leitung minam khempeuh lakah note bek hong thei-in, note bek ka hong don hi. Tua ahih manin na khialhna khempeuh uh hangin note gim ka hong pia ding hi
Mi nih, thukimna om masa lopi-in lampi-ah tonkhawm thei uh ahi hiam
A samat ding mulopi-in, gamlakah humpinelkai mawk hawk ahi hiam? Samat neilopi-in, a kua sungah humpinelkai khanglai mawk hawk ahi hiam
Thang antah omlopi-in leilaka thangah vasa mawk awk ahi hiam? A su khat omlopi-in, thang kimawksai ahi hiam
Khuapi sungah pataukohna gal peengkul a kitum ciangin mite lauloin ommawk thei ahi hiam? Topa' tun'sak lohpi-in khuapi sungah lauhuaina mawk tun' ahi hiam
Topa Pasian in ama nasem kamsangte tungah ama geelna theisak masa lopi-in bangmah hih hetlo hi
Humpinelkai a hawk ciangin lauloin ki-om thei ahi hiam? Topa Pasian in thu a gen ciangin kua in ama thu genloin om thei ding ahi hiam?
Samaria gam munmuan'huai-ah a om mite leh Egypt gam munmuan'huai-ah a om mite tungah thu zasak un la, “Samaria-ah hong kikhawm un la, tua lai-a buaina lianpite leh kinen'niamnate hong mu un,” ci un
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih mite in a manin gamtat ding theilo uh a, gilo mahmah uh a, mi' na a suh uh vante tawh a inn lianpipite uh kidimsak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin galte in a gam uh umcihin, a pan'mun muan'huai teng uh susiagawp ding a, a inn lianppipite uh luhgawp ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Humpinelkai' nekbang tuu khebom nih ahi a, a bil themkhat bek ahi zongin tuucingpa in a ngah tei mah bangin, tutphah nip kiu khat leh lupna themkhat tawh a kibang, Samaria sungah a om Israel mi tawmno khat suakta tei ding hi
Tu-in ngai un: Jakob' suanlekhakte hilhkhol un, Vanglian Pasian ahi, Topa Pasian in ci hi
Amau' khialhna hangin Israel gim ka piak ni ciangin, Bethel-a biakna taute zong ka susia ding a, biakna tau kite kitanin leilakah kia ding hi
Keimah in phalbi leh khuakhal innte ka susia ding a, saiha tawh a kibawl inn hoihte zong kisia-in, inn lian khempeuh beimang ding hi, Topa in ci hi.
